title: Rule
description: Declarative constraint input to check — never checker output.

kind.description: Open string. Core vocabulary (documented, not enforced): rule, prohibition, style.

statement.description: Declarative constraint text (human- or machine-readable; products choose grammar).

description.description: Longer explanation for integrators or authors.

target_entry_types.description: Optional ontology filter — open strings matching KnowledgeEntry entry_type vocabulary.

severity_hint.description: Optional checker hint. Core vocabulary (documented, not enforced): info, warning, error.

source_anchor.description: Optional provenance pointer when rule is anchored to manuscript.

status.description: Open string. Core vocabulary (documented, not enforced): draft, active, deprecated.

examples.statement: Character death reversals require a prior foreshadowing KnowledgeEntry.
